title: Crispy Citrus Asparagus Stir Fry
description: A Mediterranean-friendly meal-prep dish featuring white asparagus stir-fried with citrus for a burst of freshness and flavor, perfect for quick weeknight dinners.
instructions: Cut the white asparagus into bite-sized pieces.
In a small bowl, mix together the lemon and lime juices with the red pepper flakes and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant but not browned, about 30 seconds.
Add asparagus to the pan and stir fry for about 2-3 minutes until slightly tender.
Drizzle with the lemon-lime mixture, tossing well to coat evenly. Cook for an additional minute or two until the asparagus is crisp-tender but still has a slight crunch.
Stir in sesame seeds and cilantro leaves. Serve hot.
For meal prepping, store the stir-fry in individual portions in containers with plastic wrap on top of the food to prevent it from oxidizing (forming an unpleasant brown layer).
